main.description: An Access Control List (ACL) entry that authorizes a specific user to access gated content.

subjectDid.description: DID of the user being granted access.

issuerDid.description: DID of the content creator issuing the grant.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature from issuerDid verifying authenticity of the grant.

expiry.description: Optional expiration timestamp; checked by the Gatekeeper on every session handshake.
